name: chronr
must_detect_signals: package.json declares a `bin` field mapping `chronr` to an executable
bin/chronr.js begins with a `#!/usr/bin/env node` shebang
argument parsing includes a `--help`/`-h` and `--version`/`-v` branch
the tool exposes subcommands (start, split, stop, ls), not a library API
keywords and description frame it as a terminal/shell tool
expected_visual: ASCII wordmark or a copy-pasteable terminal demo block
notes: Node entrypoint, not a Python package; detection must read the bin field rather than guess from language. Library export of timer.js is a secondary surface, not the primary archetype.
